title: Vampire Orc scales from opponent primary base Modifier

card.rawText: Add your opponent's current primary creature's base Modifier to this card.

effect.value: Add opponent current primary creature's base Modifier

plan.title: Vampire Orc scales from opponent primary base Modifier
plan.summary: Put Vampire Orc on field against an opponent primary creature with base Modifier 1 and verify Vampire Orc adds that base Modifier to its own Modifier.

notes: Set Vampire Orc as player_1 primary.
Set the synthetic test primary creature as player_2 primary; it has base Modifier 1.

steps: Set Vampire Orc as player_1 primary creature.
Set the opponent synthetic creature as player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Vampire Orc adds opponent primary base Modifier

manualVerification: Confirm Vampire Orc recalculates if the opponent primary creature changes.
riskNotes: This fixture covers base Modifier copy/add from the current opponent primary creature.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Vampire Orc opponent-primary Modifier scaling.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
